fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique source identifier (e.g., src-001). Referenced by source_ref fields throughout the pack.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Title of the source document or resource.

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL or DOI. Use N/A for offline-only sources.

fields.name: retrieved_date
fields.description: ISO 8601 date the source was accessed.

fields.name: license
fields.description: License of the source (e.g., CC-BY-4.0, Public Domain, All Rights Reserved).

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Any relevant notes about the source. MAY be empty.
